name: iTop - Deploy core branch
description:
Deploy an iTop core instance based on the chosen Git branch.
_Note: Only files from iTop core repository will be updated. Extensions won't be._

parameters.name: Core branch
parameters.description:
iTop core branch to deploy.
Listed branches are from Combodo's iTop repository on GitHub, local and fork branches are not available.

parameters.name: Deployment path
parameters.description:
Relative path (from Docker HTML folder) where iTop will be deployed.
If no path specified, branch name will be used as deployment path (e.g. `feature/something-really-awesome` branch will be deployed in `<DOCKER_HTML_FOLDER>/itop/core-branches/feature/something-really-awesome`).

parameters.name: Delete existing files
parameters.description: If set to true, any existing extensions (`/extensions`, `/data/production-modules`), customizations (`data/production.delta.xml`) and configuration files will be deleted.

parameters.name: Delete existing database
parameters.description: If set to true, any existing database for the current instance (based on the configuration file) will be dropped.
